message.entry: Inputs must be scalar numeric or a vector of array dimensions.
Inputs must be scalar numeric or a vector of array dimensions. NaN and Inf are not allowed.
Inputs must be scalar numeric or a vector of array dimensions; negative inputs are replaced with zero.
Size vector should be a row vector with integer elements. This will return an error in a future release.
Input arguments must be scalar. This will return an error in a future release.
